title: Bridge Essay: Proprioceptive uncertainty promotes the rubber hand illusion.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Proprioceptive, uncertainty, promotes, the, rubber.

**Proprioceptive uncertainty promotes the rubber hand illusion.** — Cortex. PMID: 37269634. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2023.04.005. Body ownership is the multisensory perception of abody as one'sown. Recently, the emergence of body ownership illusions like the visuotactile rubber hand illusion has been described by Bayesian causal inference models in which the observer computes the probability that visual and tactile signals come from acommon source. Given the importance of proprioception for the perception of one'sbody, proprioceptive information and its relative reliability should impact this inferential process. We us
